Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Authorizes the town of Lancaster to impose an occupancy tax
Summary: Authorizes the town of Lancaster, county of Erie, to impose an occupancy tax not to exceed three percent.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to authorizing an occupancy tax in the town of Lancaster; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
